text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As I'm eating lunch in the cafeteria, I catch sight of Mejiro McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ugh... this is nowhere near enough...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: No, stay strong! You must stick to the plan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's still being too strict about what she eats. I wish I could be of
some help...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Not sure what Miss Prim-and-Proper over there's tryna prove. I just
know that all she can think about is wolfing down a bunch of those
cakes she loves.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, did'ja hear that? Suppose you would, bein' right there and all.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, yeah! She loves sweets just as much as I love justice and
liberty!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I thought her reign of terror over the strawberry-flavored realm would
resume after the tryout race, but I guess not.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, speaking of reigns of terror, it sounds like the denizens of Planet
Thirteen require my strength. See ya nara!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I think she just gave me a valuable hint.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I return to my room and spend the rest of the day researching meal
plans.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh... There you are again.
choice_data_list: Could I get you to take a look at this?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: At... your notebook?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: All right, I'll take a look.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A meal plan... There are so many options that shouldn't cause much
weight gain... Did you really put this together just for me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: And it looks like... I can eat certain sweets?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sweets are on the menu?! Are they really okay to eat?!
choice_data_list:
They'll give you more energy to run with all
your might!

They'll give you more energy to run with all
your might!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much. To think that you'd do so much for my sake,
even before scouting me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Would you mind if I borrowed this notebook for a while?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh... One more thing. Would you mind coming to watch me train next
week?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Excellent. I look forward to meeting you then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One week later, I come out to the course as promised.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I hope you've had a productive week, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Now then, I'll begin running. Please watch.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I observe her training carefully.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm feeling light as a feather!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Each of her strides are powerful and confident. The difference in her
run is like night and day!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What did you think?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm honored to hear you say that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I feel like I can finally exert my full strength thanks to that meal plan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
When it came to my diet, I thought that trying to eat less was the only
way to go.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Your meal plan had more nutritients despite lower caloric intake,
meaning I could afford to eat more.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To think that sweets could even be factored in... Hehe, I'm feeling so
much better now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In any case... I believe I've finally shown you exactly what I am
capable of.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Thank you. So allow me to introduce myself once more...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I am a member of the Mejiro family. My name obliges me to run with
the utmost of grace, splendor, and perfection.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If you are to insist on being my trainer, then you should also be
prepared to call yourself a Mejiro Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What do you say? Are you prepared to shoulder the responsibility
that would entail?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I can certainly hear the confidence in your voice!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much. Now then, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
With your guidance and encouragement, I'm looking forward to
working together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And with that, my days as Mejiro McQueen's trainer begin.
